ID: E2412 Amounts Category Item Current ($) YTD ($) Regular 2,811 49,034 Overtime 81 8,975 Bonus 1,320 8,200 Federal Tax 296 3,674 Health 139 1,343 Earnings Deductions Net Pay: $2,025
